_note: Intent → the ONE command to run. Surfaced by `recipes` (CLI) + `robinhood_recipes` (MCP). Each recipe maps a plain-English intent + trigger phrases to the verified first-class CLI command and its MCP-tool equivalent. Keep this in sync when adding commands; it is the agent's intent-routing table. Reads are live/free; writes are double-gated (--live-write + ROBINHOOD_ALLOW_LIVE_WRITE=1).

recipes.intent: Why am I down/up today or after hours? What's bleeding me?
recipes.notes: One call: per-account day Δ + after-hours Δ, drivers by underlying in DOLLARS, reconciliation. Don't hand-stitch from positions+quote.

recipes.intent: What stocks do I own?
recipes.notes: Resolves instrument UUIDs to tickers + quotes.

recipes.intent: What option contracts do I hold?
recipes.notes: Every held contract: UUID + strike + bid/ask/last + qty + link, across accounts.

recipes.intent: Quote a symbol or several
recipes.notes: Live equity/ETF quotes.

recipes.intent: Show the options chain / expirations
recipes.notes: Bulk-enumerate first — option UUIDs are random v4, never computable.

recipes.intent: Get every option_instrument_id for a chain/expiration
recipes.notes: The backbone of every options flow. One API call per chain/expiration/type.

recipes.intent: Price a spread / iron condor / straddle (dry-run)
recipes.notes: Resolves ids, reads bid/ask/Greeks, computes net credit/debit + a limit, fills the dry-run body. Sends nothing.

recipes.intent: Plan a named options strategy (template body)
recipes.notes: Emits reviewContract + lookup steps + options/orders/ body template.

recipes.intent: Roll an option position (staged close+open)
recipes.notes: Cash-account aware (T+1 kosher roll). Dry-run plan only.

recipes.intent: Pull all info on one owned contract (Greeks + fills)
recipes.notes: Metadata + live Greeks + fill history + buy/sell handoff.

recipes.intent: What transactions went through (today/recently)?
recipes.notes: Merges equity + options + crypto orders + ACH transfers, newest first.

recipes.intent: Full stock detail page (quote + fundamentals + borrow + margin)
recipes.notes: Joins quote, description, fundamentals, shorting/borrow, buying-power, margin.

recipes.intent: Read my watchlists
recipes.notes: owner_type=custom is mandatory (handled internally).

recipes.intent: List all my accounts + capabilities
recipes.notes: Full graph via transfer/accounts/ (bare accounts/ under-reports). Never hardcode account numbers.

recipes.intent: Buy a stock (dollars or shares)
recipes.notes: Double-gated. Ground the ticker with `brokerage search` first; OTC auto-limits at ask (whole shares only).

recipes.intent: Pre-trade options context: buying power, fees, collateral
recipes.notes: Options buying power is the REAL gate on opens (not regular BP, esp. GTC overnight). The options/orders/review preview is a gated POST until verified non-mutating.

recipes.intent: Place/cancel an options order
recipes.notes: Double-gated. Classify the strategy + bulk-enumerate UUIDs first; keep the {0} placeholder + --param.

recipes.intent: Read/toggle an account setting (DRIP, PDT-protection, sweep, lending)
recipes.notes: Reads free; writes double-gated. DRIP write is PATCH corp_actions/drip/account_settings/{account_number}/, NOT drip/enrollment/.

recipes.intent: List / pause / resume recurring buys
recipes.notes: pause --all only pauses ACTIVE; resume --all only resumes PAUSED. Report what actually changed.

recipes.intent: Find / understand an API route (what it needs + returns)
recipes.notes: describe = self-documenting card (tokens, query keys, response fields, command); directory = by-domain index.

recipes.intent: Capture a NEW endpoint not yet in the map
recipes.command: use the api-capture-kit (enumerate-site-api skill): arm interceptor → drive UI → harvest → add to brokerage-routes.json → rebuild
recipes.notes: Capture, don't guess. Mark unverified write bodies as research. Re-run scripts/harvest-response-fields.mjs to attach fields.
